url: https://expandedramblings.com/index.php/winco-foods-statistics-and-facts/
title: "WinCo Foods Statistics (2026): Store Count, Employees, Ownership Model & Key Facts"
---

![WinCo Foods statistics and facts (2026 update)](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20327%20327'%3E%3C/svg%3E "WinCo Foods Statistics and Facts (2026 Update)"){.alignright .wp-image-129375 lazy-sizes="(max-width: 327px) 100vw, 327px" lazy-src="https://expandedramblings.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/winco-foods-statistics-and-facts.png" lazy-srcset="https://expandedramblings.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/winco-foods-statistics-and-facts.png 200w, https://expandedramblings.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/winco-foods-statistics-and-facts-20x20.png 20w, https://expandedramblings.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/winco-foods-statistics-and-facts-40x40.png 40w, https://expandedramblings.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/winco-foods-statistics-and-facts-60x60.png 60w, https://expandedramblings.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/winco-foods-statistics-and-facts-150x150.png 150w, https://expandedramblings.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/winco-foods-statistics-and-facts-50x50.png 50w, https://expandedramblings.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/winco-foods-statistics-and-facts-100x100.png 100w" decoding="async" height="327" width="327"}

WinCo Foods is a U.S. supermarket chain known for a warehouse-style format, aggressive everyday pricing, and a large bulk foods section. Because WinCo is privately held and employee-owned, the most reliable public metrics are usually the company's own "About" disclosures (store count and employee count) rather than third-party estimates. This 2026 update focuses on those official, verifiable figures.

## Quick Answer (2026)

WinCo Foods' official About page states the company operates **140+ employee-owned retail locations** and has **20,000+ employees**. WinCo began as Waremart in **1967** and adopted the WinCo Foods name in **1999**.

## Key Metrics (Summary Table)

  Metric             Value         Year / Context         Notes
  ------------------ ------------- ---------------------- -------------------------------
  Retail locations   140+ stores   Company "About" page   Employee-owned stores (ESOP)
  Employees          20,000+       Company "About" page   Company-stated workforce size
  Founded            1967          Company history        Founded as Waremart
  Name change        1999          Company history        Rebranded to WinCo Foods

## WinCo Foods Facts

-   **Website:** [wincofoods.com](https://www.wincofoods.com/){.external rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" target="_blank"}
-   **Founded:** 1967 (as Waremart)
-   **Rebranded:** 1999 (WinCo Foods)
-   **Ownership model:** Employee-owned via ESOP
-   **Headquarters:** Boise, Idaho (commonly cited)

## WinCo Foods Scale Statistics

-   **Retail locations:** 140+ employee-owned stores
-   **Employees:** 20,000+

## What Makes WinCo Different?

WinCo is often associated with a "no-frills" value model: warehouse-style stores, strong private-label presence, and bulk bins that allow customers to buy exactly the quantity they want. The company also highlights employee ownership as part of its identity.

### Helpful Definitions

-   **ESOP (Employee Stock Ownership Plan):** A structure where employees own shares (often through a retirement plan), aligning incentives around store performance and long-term efficiency.
-   **Retail locations:** Store count is best interpreted as a minimum ("140+") when the company uses a plus sign rather than an exact figure.

## FAQ

### How many WinCo Foods stores are there?

WinCo's official About page states **140+ employee-owned stores**.

### How many employees does WinCo Foods have?

WinCo's official About page states **20,000+ employees**.

### Is WinCo Foods employee-owned?

Yes. WinCo describes itself as employee-owned and references its ESOP history in its company timeline.

## Sources / References

-   [WinCo Foods "About Us" (140+ stores, 20,000+ employees, history)](https://www.wincofoods.com/about-us){.external rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" target="_blank"}

*Note: WinCo is privately held, so audited public financial statements are not released in the same standardized way as public retailers.*

DMR Publisher. Director of Marketing by day and I run this little site at night. Other interests include Disney, Sports, 80\'s Nostalgia, LEGO, Star Wars and Tech Gadgets. Other site is [DisneyNews.us](https://disneynews.us/).
